basics.name: Dor Tzabari
basics.label: Business Development Director — Building AI Products
basics.summary: Business Development Director with 8+ years experience building and driving GTM strategies in early-stage startups, resulting in qualified enterprise pipelines, paid POCs, and long-term commercial partnerships across the US, EMEA, and APAC. Co-founded a smart-city startup (sole-source vendor to Tel Aviv Municipality) and was the founding GTM hire for an autonomous vehicle company. Experienced in cultivating C-level relationships within global enterprises, forming strategic alliances, and working cross-functionally to accelerate product-market fit. Former IDF officer (Captain, Yahalom).

work.name: DriveU.auto
work.summary: Provider of teleoperation and autonomy for vehicles, deployed across global autonomous fleets.
highlights: Built and executed global GTM strategy across US, EMEA, and APAC; scaled pipeline to $5M+ in potential ACV with 4x coverage ratio through 100+ qualified enterprise leads
Led end-to-end sales cycles converting discovery into 10 paid POCs and 4 multi-year commercial agreements worth $300K–$1.5M

Configured OpenClaw — an open-source agent runtime — for a non-standard BD outbound use case at DriveU, repurposed as the enrichment + first-touch engine letting a single-person BD function operate at team-scale output
Built proprietary account intelligence database of 600+ organizations, mapping ICPs and decision-makers across target verticals
Partnered with CEO, Product, and Engineering to translate enterprise requirements into technical scope and delivery plans for POCs
Cultivated C-level relationships at global events (CES, MWC, Manifest) and established channel partnerships for platform integration and resale

work.name: Greener Israel
work.summary: Smart-waste / smart-city platform; sole distributor of Bigbelly in Israel; flagship deployment with Tel Aviv Municipality across the entire Rothschild Boulevard.
highlights: Owned full company buildout from founding through market entry — product roadmap, GTM strategy, operations, and legal
Led business development and pilot negotiations, landing flagship deployment with Tel Aviv Municipality on Rothschild Boulevard
Negotiated sole-source vendor designation with Tel Aviv Municipality, eliminating competitive tender requirements
Raised $100K in pre-seed funding — built pitch narrative, financial model, and investor pipeline from scratch

education.summary: Foundation in software engineering, algorithms, and system architecture.

military.position: Officer (Captain), Yahalom — Combat Engineering Unit for Special Operations
highlights: Commanded a team of 20 soldiers through complex, high-stakes operations
Founded and led a technological R&D unit — recruiting senior industry experts and driving innovation initiatives

projects.name: bdr-agent
projects.description: Production AI sales-development pipeline for a B2B startup, built as 6 n8n workflows.
highlights: Slack-approval interactivity with idempotent state management
AI correction loop using GPT-4.1 with debounce + schedule sweeps
ICP scoring with arithmetic safety net
Free-text command routing in Slack channel
Built one node at a time to understand every piece

projects.name: OpenClaw — configured for BD outbound
projects.description: Non-standard use case design over OpenClaw, an open-source multi-channel agent runtime (openclaw.ai). Repurposed multi-channel routing as the enrichment + first-touch engine for a single-person BD function in production.
highlights: Recognized fit between an open-source runtime designed for chat and a single-person BD function that needed agentic infrastructure
Configured platform defaults to serve a BD-outbound use case the platform wasn't marketed for
Production deployment on Dor's own pipeline
